title: Acianthera odontotepala
taxonomy: Acianthera odontotepala belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It is a species of orchid that is native to Colombia and Ecuador. The classification of Acianthera odontotepala places it within the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, a group of orchids that are primarily found in the Americas. The genus Acianthera is a relatively recent classification, having been introduced in 2009 to replace the genus Pabstia. The specific classification of Acianthera odontotepala reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other orchid species.
